questions.question: Workshop mein kaam karte samay sabse pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Safety glasses pehenna

questions.explanation: Safety glasses, gloves, aur steel-toed boots jaise PPE (Personal Protective Equipment) pehenna workshop mein kaam shuru karne se pehle zaroori hai safety ke liye.

questions.question: Tyre fitting ke liye kaun sa tool sabse zaroori hai lug nuts tight karne ke liye?

options.B: Torque wrench

questions.explanation: Torque wrench ka use karke lug nuts ko specified torque par tight karna zaroori hai taaki wheels properly secure ho aur over-tightening ya under-tightening se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Ek radial tyre ki kya pehchan hoti hai?

options.B: Isme ply cords tyre ke center se radius tak jaate hain
options.C: Isme ply cords ek angle par hote hain
options.D: Yeh sirf trucks mein use hota hai

questions.explanation: Radial tyres mein ply cords tyre ke center se radius tak jaate hain, jo better handling aur longer tread life provide karte hain.

questions.question: Tyre fitting machine use karte waqt kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Machine ko bina lubrication ke use karna
options.B: Machine ke moving parts se haath door rakhna
options.C: Tyre bead ko zor se todna
options.D: Machine ko tez speed par chalana

questions.explanation: Tyre fitting machine ke moving parts se haath aur fingers ko door rakhna bahut zaroori hai taaki injuries se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Workshop mein fire extinguisher kis type ki aag ke liye suitable hota hai jo oil ya fuel se lage?

options.B: Class B

questions.explanation: Class B fire extinguishers flammable liquids jaise oil, grease, petrol, diesel se lagi aag ke liye use hote hain.

questions.question: Tyre bead breaker ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Tyre ko rim se alag karna

questions.explanation: Bead breaker ka use tyre ke bead ko rim se separate karne ke liye kiya jaata hai, jo tyre removal process ka pehla step hai.

questions.question: Jack stand ka primary purpose kya hai?

options.B: Lift ki hui gaadi ko support karna

questions.explanation: Jack stand ka primary purpose lift ki hui gaadi ko additional support provide karna hai, taaki jack fail hone par gaadi girne se bache.

questions.question: Ek tyre ki 'load index' kya darshata hai?

options.B: Tyre ka maximum permissible weight carrying capacity

questions.explanation: Load index ek numerical code hai jo tyre ki maximum weight carrying capacity ko darshata hai jab woh specified pressure par inflate ho.

questions.question: Tyre fitting ke dauraan tyre aur rim ko lubricate kyun karte hain?

options.A: Tyre ko chamakdar banane ke liye
options.B: Friction kam karne aur fitting ko aasan banane ke liye
options.C: Tyre ko thanda rakhne ke liye
options.D: Tyre ko puncture se bachane ke liye

questions.explanation: Lubrication friction ko kam karta hai, jisse tyre ko rim par mount karna aur demount karna aasan ho jaata hai aur tyre ya rim ko damage hone se bachata hai.

questions.question: Workshop mein electrical tools use karte samay kya check karna zaroori hai?

options.B: Power cord damage hai ya nahi

questions.explanation: Electrical tools use karne se pehle power cord aur plug ko damage ke liye check karna zaroori hai taaki electrical hazards se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Tyre sidewall par likha 'DOT' mark kya signify karta hai?

options.B: Department of Transport compliance

questions.explanation: DOT mark signify karta hai ki tyre US Department of Transportation ke safety standards ko meet karta hai. Iske baad ka code tyre ki manufacturing location aur date batata hai.

questions.question: Pneumatic tools (air tools) use karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Hamesha safety goggles pehenna
options.C: Hawa ke pipe ko zameen par chhod dena
options.D: Tool ko bina oil ke use karna

questions.explanation: Pneumatic tools high-speed rotating parts aur flying debris ka risk rakhte hain, isliye safety goggles pehenna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Tyre ke sidewall par 'Treadwear, Traction, Temperature' ratings kya darshati hain?

options.B: Tyre ki performance characteristics

questions.explanation: Yeh UTQG (Uniform Tire Quality Grading) ratings hain jo tyre ki relative treadwear rate, wet traction capability, aur temperature resistance ko darshati hain.

questions.question: Workshop mein oil spills ko turant saaf karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Floor ko chamakdar rakhne ke liye
options.B: Slip-and-fall accidents se bachne ke liye
options.C: Oil ko reuse karne ke liye
options.D: Machine ko kharab hone se bachane ke liye

questions.explanation: Oil spills se workshop mein slip-and-fall accidents ho sakte hain, isliye unhe turant saaf karna safety ke liye critical hai.

questions.question: Tyre ki 'speed rating' kya batati hai?

options.A: Maximum speed jis par tyre safely operate kar sakta hai
options.B: Tyre ki acceleration speed

questions.explanation: Speed rating ek alphabetical code hai jo tyre ki maximum safe operating speed ko darshata hai. Jaise 'H' for 210 km/h.

questions.question: Tyre fitting ke baad wheel nut ko tight karne ka correct sequence kya hai?

options.B: Anti-clockwise sequence

questions.explanation: Wheel nuts ko star pattern (cross-pattern) mein tight karna zaroori hai taaki wheel evenly seat ho aur vibrations ya damage se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Tyre fitting ke dauraan rim par tyre ko mount karte samay kis cheez ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Tyre ko dry mount karna chahiye
options.B: Tyre aur rim ko proper lubricant se lubricate karna chahiye
options.C: Tyre ko reverse direction mein mount karna chahiye
options.D: Tyre ko zor se thookna chahiye

questions.explanation: Tyre aur rim ko proper lubricant se lubricate karne se tyre smoothly mount hota hai, rim ya bead ko damage hone se bachata hai.

questions.question: Tyre ka tread depth check karne ke liye kaun sa tool use hota hai?

options.B: Torque wrench

questions.explanation: Tread depth gauge specifically tyre ke tread ki gehrai ko measure karne ke liye banaya gaya hai.

questions.question: India mein passenger car tyres ke liye minimum legally allowed tread depth kitna hai?

options.B: 1.6 mm

questions.explanation: India mein passenger car tyres ke liye minimum legal tread depth 1.6 mm hai. Isse kam hone par tyre ko replace karna chahiye.

questions.question: Under-inflated tyre ke kya signs hote hain?

options.A: Tread ka center wear out hota hai
options.B: Tread ke edges wear out hote hain
options.C: Tyre ka side wall bahar ki taraf bulging karta hai
options.D: Tyre ka center aur edges dono wear out hote hain

questions.explanation: Under-inflated tyre mein, tyre ka center road se properly contact nahi karta, aur weight zyada edges par padta hai, jisse edges wear out hote hain.

questions.question: Tyre pressure gauge kis unit mein reading deta hai?

options.B: PSI (Pounds per Square Inch)

questions.explanation: Tyre pressure gauge aam taur par PSI (Pounds per Square Inch) ya Bar mein readings deta hai.

questions.question: Tyre rotation kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Tyre ka colour maintain karne ke liye
options.B: Tyre wear ko even karne aur life badhane ke liye
options.C: Tyre pressure ko adjust karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Tyre rotation se sabhi tyres par wear evenly distribute hota hai, jisse unki total life badhti hai aur uniform performance milti hai.

questions.question: Over-inflated tyre ke kya signs hote hain?

options.A: Tread ke edges wear out hote hain
options.B: Tread ka center wear out hota hai
options.C: Tyre ka side wall andar ki taraf bulging karta hai
options.D: Tyre ka total diameter kam ho jaata hai

questions.explanation: Over-inflated tyre mein, tyre ka center road se zyada contact karta hai, jisse center portion zyada wear hota hai.

questions.question: Tyre sidewall par 'P205/55R16' mein 'P' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Passenger Car Tyre

questions.explanation: 'P' signify karta hai ki yeh ek passenger car tyre hai. Agar 'LT' hota toh light truck tyre hota.

questions.question: Tyre sidewall par '205/55R16' mein '205' kya darshata hai?

options.B: Tyre ki width (mm)

questions.explanation: 205 mm mein tyre ki width ko darshata hai, jo tread ke ek end se doosre end tak hoti hai.

questions.question: Tyre sidewall par '205/55R16' mein '55' kya darshata hai?

options.A: Tyre ki width ka percentage mein aspect ratio
options.B: Tyre ki height ka percentage mein aspect ratio

questions.explanation: 55 tyre ka aspect ratio hai, jo sidewall height ka percentage hai tyre ki width ke relative (55% of 205mm).

questions.question: Tyre sidewall par '205/55R16' mein 'R' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Radial construction

questions.explanation: 'R' ka matlab hai ki tyre ki construction radial hai, jo modern passenger vehicle tyres mein common hai.

questions.question: Tyre sidewall par '205/55R16' mein '16' kya darshata hai?

options.B: Rim ka diameter (inches)

questions.explanation: 16 inches mein wheel rim ka diameter hai, jis par yeh tyre mount hoga.

questions.question: Tyre wear pattern mein 'cupping' ya 'scalloping' kya indicate karta hai?

options.B: Under-inflation
options.C: Worn out shock absorbers ya suspension components

questions.explanation: Cupping ya scalloping wear pattern aam taur par worn out shock absorbers, struts, ya loose suspension components ko indicate karta hai.

questions.question: Tyre ke valve stem ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Tyre mein hawa bharne aur hawa ko andar lock karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Valve stem tyre mein hawa bharne aur usse andar seal karne ke liye ek one-way valve provide karta hai.

questions.question: Agar tyre mein slow leak ho toh sabse pehle kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Valve stem aur uski cap

questions.explanation: Slow leaks aksar faulty valve stems ya loose valve caps ke kaaran hote hain. Inhe sabse pehle check karna chahiye.

questions.question: Tyre ki life badhane ke liye kya regularly karna chahiye?

options.B: Tyre pressure check karna aur maintain karna
options.C: Tyre ko zyada hawa se bharna

questions.explanation: Correct tyre pressure maintain karne se tyre evenly wear hota hai aur uski life badhti hai, saath hi fuel efficiency bhi improve hoti hai.

questions.question: Tyre pressure kab check karna sabse best hota hai?

options.B: Jab tyre thanda ho (gaadi chalane se pehle)

questions.explanation: Tyre pressure tab check karna chahiye jab tyre 'cold' ho, yaani gaadi kam se kam teen ghante se khadi ho ya bahut kam chali ho. Garam tyres mein pressure badha hua dikhta hai.

questions.question: Tyre sidewall par cracks ya bulges kya indicate karte hain?

options.B: Tyre damaged hai aur unsafe ho sakta hai
options.D: Tyre ko balancing ki zaroorat hai

questions.explanation: Sidewall par cracks ya bulges internal damage ko indicate karte hain aur tyre ke burst hone ka risk badhate hain, isliye tyre ko replace karna chahiye.

questions.question: Gaadi ko lift karne ke liye sabse safe method kya hai?

options.A: Ek jack se poori gaadi uthana
options.B: Proper lifting points par jack aur jack stands ka use karna
options.D: Gaadi ko ek side se tilted position mein rakhna

questions.explanation: Manufacturer ke specified lifting points par jack aur jack stands ka use karna gaadi ko lift karne ka sabse safe aur stable method hai.

questions.question: Wheel nuts ko remove karne se pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Gaadi ko lift karna
options.C: Wheel nuts ko thoda loose karna jab gaadi zameen par ho

questions.explanation: Wheel nuts ko thoda loose karna jab gaadi zameen par ho, unhe remove karna aasan banata hai aur gaadi ke girne ka risk kam karta hai.

questions.question: Tyre fitting machine par tyre ko mount karte samay kis cheez ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Tyre bead aur rim ko lubrication dena
options.C: Machine ko tez speed par chalana

questions.explanation: Tyre bead aur rim ko proper tyre lubricant se lubricate karne se tyre smoothly mount hota hai aur damage se bachta hai.

questions.question: Agar tyre bead rim par properly seat na ho toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Bead blaster ya high-pressure air ka use karna

questions.explanation: Agar tyre bead seat nahi ho raha toh bead blaster ya controlled high-pressure air ka use karke tyre bead ko rim par seat kiya ja sakta hai. Safety precautions lena zaroori hai.

questions.question: Tyre ko rim se demount karte samay, bead breaker ka use kis liye hota hai?

options.A: Tyre ko inflate karne ke liye
options.B: Tyre bead ko rim ke edge se alag karne ke liye
options.C: Tyre ko balance karne ke liye
options.D: Rim ko saaf karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Bead breaker tyre bead ko rim ke edge se alag karta hai, jisse tyre ko rim se utarna aasan ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Tyre fitting machine par tyre ko rotate karte samay, operator ko kahan khada hona chahiye?

options.B: Tyre ke side mein, safety distance par

questions.explanation: Tyre ke side mein, safety distance par khada hona chahiye taaki agar tyre blow out ho ya koi part nikal jaaye toh injury se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Jab tyre ko inflate kar rahe ho, toh tyre pressure kis level tak pahunchne par bead seat hota hai?

options.B: 20-40 PSI (vehicle specific pressure se zyada nahi)

questions.explanation: Tyre bead aam taur par 20-40 PSI ke beech seat ho jaata hai. Manufacturer ke recommended pressure se zyada inflate nahi karna chahiye bead ko seat karne ke liye.

questions.question: Tubeless tyre fitting ke baad, kya step zaroori hai leak check karne ke liye?

options.B: Tyre aur valve stem area par soapy water spray karna

questions.explanation: Soapy water spray karne se leaks bubbles ke roop mein dikh jaate hain, khaaskar bead area aur valve stem ke around.

questions.question: Wheel lugs ko tighten karne ke liye torque wrench ka use kyun karte hain?

options.A: Unhe jaldi tight karne ke liye
options.B: Unhe uniform aur correct torque par tight karne ke liye
options.D: Unhe kabhi loose na hone dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Torque wrench ensures that wheel lugs are tightened to the manufacturer's specified torque, preventing over-tightening (which can damage studs) or under-tightening (which can lead to loose wheels).

questions.question: Agar wheel nuts ko over-tighten kiya jaaye toh kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: Wheel studs damage ho sakte hain ya break ho sakte hain

questions.explanation: Over-tightening se wheel studs stretch ho sakte hain, unhe damage ho sakta hai ya woh toot sakte hain, jisse wheel failure ka risk badhta hai.

questions.question: Tyre ko rim par mount karte samay, agar tyre directional ho, toh kis baat ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Tyre ke rotation arrow ka

questions.explanation: Directional tyres par ek arrow bana hota hai jo unki correct rotation direction batata hai. Iska dhyaan rakhna zaroori hai proper performance ke liye.

questions.question: Tyre fitting ke baad, gaadi ko road par chalane se pehle kya check karna important hai?

options.B: Brakes aur tyre pressure

questions.explanation: Tyre fitting ke baad, tyre pressure ko correct level par set karna aur brakes ko check karna bahut zaroori hai safety ke liye.

questions.question: Tyre fitting machine ke 'mounting head' ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Tyre bead ko rim par mount ya demount karna

questions.explanation: Mounting head tyre fitting machine ka woh part hai jo tyre bead ko rim ke upar ya neeche karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Jab ek wheel ko gaadi se remove kar rahe ho, toh lug nuts ko nikalne ke baad wheel ko kaise bahar nikalna chahiye?

options.A: Wheel ko zor se khinch kar
options.B: Wheel ko carefully dono haathon se pakad kar bahar nikalna

questions.explanation: Wheel ko carefully dono haathon se pakad kar bahar nikalna chahiye taaki wheel ya studs ko damage na ho aur operator ko injury na lage.

questions.question: Alloy wheels ko handle karte samay kya extra precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Unhe scratch hone se bachana

questions.explanation: Alloy wheels scratches aur dings ke prati zyada sensitive hote hain, isliye unhe carefully handle karna chahiye taaki unki aesthetics kharab na ho.

questions.question: Tyre inflation ke dauraan, operator ko kahan khada hona chahiye?

options.B: Tyre ke side mein, safety cage ya barrier ke peeche

questions.explanation: Tyre inflation ke dauraan blow-out ka risk hota hai. Safety cage ya barrier ke peeche, tyre ke side mein khada hona sabse safe position hai.

questions.question: Tyre fitting ke baad, gaadi ko lift se neeche utarne se pehle kya confirm karna chahiye?

options.A: Sabhi tools apni jagah par hain
options.B: Wheel nuts properly tight hain

questions.explanation: Gaadi ko neeche utarne se pehle yeh confirm karna zaroori hai ki sabhi wheel nuts manufacturer ke specification ke according properly tightened hain.

questions.question: Wheel balancing kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Tyre ka colour maintain karne ke liye
options.B: Vibrations ko eliminate karne aur tyre wear ko uniform karne ke liye
options.C: Tyre pressure adjust karne ke liye
options.D: Tyre ko puncture se bachane ke liye

questions.explanation: Wheel balancing se wheel assembly mein weight evenly distribute hota hai, jisse vibrations khatam hote hain, tyre wear uniform hota hai, aur suspension components ki life badhti hai.

questions.question: Static imbalance kya hota hai?

options.A: Wheel ke circumference mein weight ka uneven distribution
options.B: Wheel ke center line par weight ka uneven distribution

questions.explanation: Static imbalance tab hota hai jab wheel ke center line par weight evenly distributed nahi hota, jisse wheel bounce karta hai (vertical vibration).

questions.question: Dynamic imbalance kya hota hai?

options.A: Wheel ke circumference mein weight ka uneven distribution
options.B: Wheel ke center line par weight ka uneven distribution
options.C: Wheel ke dono sides par weight ka uneven distribution, jisse wobble hota hai

questions.explanation: Dynamic imbalance tab hota hai jab wheel ke dono sides par weight evenly distributed nahi hota, jisse wheel wobble karta hai (lateral vibration).

questions.question: Wheel balancing machine par wheel ko mount karne se pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Wheel ko saaf karna

questions.explanation: Wheel ko saaf karna zaroori hai taaki koi bhi mitti, kachra, ya purane weights balancing readings ko affect na karein.

questions.question: Wheel balancing machine par readings kis units mein aati hain?

options.B: Grams (g) ya Ounces (oz)

questions.explanation: Wheel balancing machines aam taur par required weights ko grams (g) ya ounces (oz) mein display karti hain.

questions.question: Clip-on weights kahan use hote hain?

options.B: Rim ke inner aur outer flange par

questions.explanation: Clip-on weights aam taur par steel rims par rim ke inner aur outer flange par attach kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Adhesive (stick-on) weights kahan use hote hain?

options.A: Rim ke inner aur outer flange par
options.B: Tyre ke tread par
options.C: Alloy wheels ke inner surface par

questions.explanation: Adhesive weights aam taur par alloy wheels par unke aesthetic ko maintain rakhne ke liye rim ke inner surface par lagaye jaate hain.

questions.question: Agar wheel properly balanced na ho toh driving ke dauraan kya feel hoga?

options.B: Steering wheel mein vibrations, ya poori gaadi mein shake

questions.explanation: Unbalanced wheels se steering wheel mein vibrations, poori gaadi mein shake, aur uneven tyre wear hota hai.

questions.question: Wheel balancing machine par wheel ko mount karte samay kis cheez ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Wheel ko center cone ya flange plate se properly center karna
options.C: Wheel ko tilt karke mount karna

questions.explanation: Wheel ko balancing machine par properly center karna zaroori hai accurate readings ke liye. Incorrect centering se galat balance readings aayengi.

questions.question: Wheel balancing ke dauraan purane weights ko kyun remove karna chahiye?

options.A: Naye weights lagane ke liye jagah banane ke liye
options.B: Accurate balance readings ke liye
options.C: Wheel ko halka karne ke liye
options.D: Customer ko naya bill dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Purane weights ko remove karna zaroori hai taaki machine current wheel assembly ke true imbalance ko detect kar sake aur accurate corrections suggest kar sake.

questions.question: Wheel balancing machine par weight lagane ke baad kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Wheel ko phir se spin karna
options.B: Wheel ko gaadi par laga dena

questions.explanation: Weights lagane ke baad, wheel ko phir se spin karna chahiye taaki yeh confirm ho sake ki wheel ab properly balanced hai (readings zero ya bahut kam honi chahiye).

questions.question: Agar wheel balancing ke baad bhi vibrations aa rahe hain toh kya reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Tyre mein flat spot hai ya internal damage hai
options.C: Gaadi ne bahut kam chali hai

questions.explanation: Vibrations agar balancing ke baad bhi continue karte hain toh tyre mein flat spots, internal damage, ya bend rim jaise issues ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Wheel balancing ke liye kaun sa metal ka weight use hota hai?

options.B: Aluminium

questions.explanation: Historically lead weights use hote the, par environmental concerns ke kaaran ab steel aur zinc weights zyada common hain.

questions.question: Tyre aur rim assembly ko balance karne ke liye, weight kahan lagana chahiye?

options.B: Imbalance ke same side par

questions.explanation: Weights hamesha imbalance ke opposite side par lagaye jaate hain taaki wheel assembly ka total weight evenly distribute ho.

questions.question: Wheel balancing machine par 'run-out' kya measure karta hai?

options.B: Rim ki golai (roundness) aur straightness

questions.explanation: Run-out machine rim ki golai (radial run-out) aur straightness (lateral run-out) ko measure karti hai, jo vibrations ka source ho sakte hain even if balanced.

questions.question: Agar ek wheel mein bahut zyada imbalance hai, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Tyre aur rim ko inspect karna for damage ya defect, aur agar zaroori ho toh replace karna

questions.explanation: Agar wheel mein excessive imbalance hai jo normal weights se correct nahi ho raha, toh tyre aur rim ko damage ya manufacturing defects ke liye inspect karna chahiye. Ho sakta hai ki replacement ki zaroorat ho.

questions.question: Wheel balancing ke baad, customer ko kya advise karna chahiye?

options.B: Regular intervals par tyre rotation aur re-balancing karwana
options.D: Weights ko khud se adjust karna

questions.explanation: Regular tyre rotation aur re-balancing se tyre wear even rehta hai aur gaadi ki smooth ride maintain rehti hai.

questions.question: Tyre mein puncture detect karne ka sabse common method kya hai?

options.B: Tyre par soapy water spray karna

questions.explanation: Soapy water spray karne se leak area par bubbles bante hain, jisse puncture easily locate ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Tubeless tyre repair ke liye sabse common method kya hai jo temporary fix ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: Tyre plug (string plug)

questions.explanation: Tyre plug (string plug) road-side ya temporary puncture repair ke liye bahut common hai. Yeh quick aur easy hota hai.

questions.question: Permanent tubeless tyre repair ke liye kaun sa method best hai?

options.B: Combination patch/plug (mushroom plug)

questions.explanation: Combination patch/plug (mushroom plug) puncture ko andar se seal karta hai aur bahar se fill karta hai, jo ek robust aur permanent repair mana jaata hai.

questions.question: Tyre repair karne se pehle tyre ko rim se kyun utarna zaroori hai (string plug ko chhodkar)?

options.A: Tyre ko saaf karne ke liye
options.B: Puncture ko andar se inspect aur repair karne ke liye
options.C: Tyre ko chamakdar banane ke liye
options.D: Tyre ka weight check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Puncture ko andar se inspect karna zaroori hai taaki koi internal damage ya sidewall damage na ho. Proper repair andar se hi kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Kis area mein puncture hone par tyre ko repair karna unsafe hota hai?

options.B: Tread ke shoulder area mein

questions.explanation: Sidewall par puncture repair karna unsafe hota hai kyuki sidewall tyre ka sabse flexible part hota hai aur repair stress ko handle nahi kar paata, jisse blow-out ka risk badhta hai.

questions.question: Puncture repair ke dauraan, puncture hole ko reaming tool se saaf kyun karte hain?

options.A: Hole ko bada karne ke liye
options.B: Hole ko saaf karne aur repair material ke liye rough surface banane ke liye
options.C: Hole ko chhota karne ke liye
options.D: Hole ko bend karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Reaming tool puncture hole ko saaf karta hai, uske edges ko smooth karta hai, aur repair material ke liye ek acchi bonding surface provide karta hai.

questions.question: Tyre repair cement (vulcanizing fluid) ka kya role hai?

options.A: Tyre ko waterproof banane ke liye
options.B: Patch aur tyre ke beech chemical bond banane ke liye
options.C: Tyre ko thanda rakhne ke liye
options.D: Tyre ko chamakdar banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Vulcanizing fluid patch aur tyre ke rubber ke beech ek strong chemical bond banata hai, jisse repair permanent aur air-tight hota hai.

questions.question: Tubeless tyre repair ke baad, kya step zaroori hai leak check karne ke liye?

options.B: Repair area par soapy water spray karna

questions.explanation: Repair ke baad, repair area par soapy water spray karke confirm karna zaroori hai ki koi leak nahi hai.

questions.question: Agar puncture bahut bada ho (e.g., 6mm se zyada), toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Use bade patch se repair karna
options.B: Tyre ko replace karna
options.D: Tyre ko bina hawa ke chalana

questions.explanation: Bade punctures (aam taur par 6mm se zyada) tyre ki structural integrity ko compromise kar sakte hain aur unhe repair karna unsafe hota hai. Tyre replacement hi ekmatra safe option hai.

questions.question: Tube type tyre mein puncture repair ke liye kya procedure use hota hai?

options.B: Patching (cold patch ya hot patch) tube par

questions.explanation: Tube type tyre mein, puncture ko tube par patch lagakar repair kiya jaata hai. Tyre itself repair nahi hota.

questions.question: Valve stem replacement kab zaroori hota hai?

options.B: Jab valve stem damaged ho ya leak kar raha ho
options.D: Jab tyre ka colour change ho

questions.explanation: Valve stem tyre ka ek critical component hai. Agar yeh damaged ho ya leak kar raha ho, toh ise turant replace karna chahiye.

questions.question: Tyre repair ke baad tyre ko inflate karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Manufacturer ke recommended pressure tak hi inflate karna
options.C: Tyre ko bina pressure gauge ke inflate karna
options.D: Tyre ko thanda hone se pehle inflate karna

questions.explanation: Manufacturer ke recommended pressure tak hi inflate karna chahiye taaki tyre safely operate kare aur repair par unnecessary stress na pade.

questions.question: Run-flat tyres mein puncture hone par kya advantage hota hai?

options.A: Unhe kabhi repair nahi kiya ja sakta
options.B: Woh limited distance tak bina hawa ke chal sakte hain

questions.explanation: Run-flat tyres reinforced sidewalls ke saath aate hain jo puncture hone par bhi limited speed aur distance tak gaadi ko chalane ki anumati dete hain, bina tyre change kiye.

questions.question: Tyre repair ke liye buffing tool ka kya use hai?

options.A: Tyre ko chamakdar banane ke liye
options.B: Repair area ko saaf aur rough karne ke liye taaki patch acchi tarah chipke
options.C: Tyre ko thanda karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Buffing tool repair area ko saaf karta hai aur uski surface ko rough banata hai, jisse patch ke liye ek strong bonding surface milti hai.

questions.question: Agar tyre ka inner liner damaged ho gaya ho puncture ke kaaran, toh kya zaroori hai repair se pehle?

options.B: Inner liner ko buff karna aur seal karna

questions.explanation: Inner liner ko properly buff karke repair karna aur seal karna zaroori hai taaki tyre ki air retention capability restore ho aur moisture tyre ke andar na ghuse.

questions.question: Tyre repair ke baad, kya wheel balancing karna zaroori hai?

options.B: Haan, hamesha zaroori hai
options.D: Sirf agar tyre mein bahut zyada hawa ho

questions.explanation: Tyre repair ke dauraan tyre ko rim se utara jaata hai aur patch lagane se tyre ka weight distribution change ho sakta hai, isliye re-balancing zaroori hai.

questions.question: TPMS ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Tyre Performance Monitoring System

questions.explanation: TPMS ka full form Tyre Pressure Monitoring System hai, jo gaadi ke tyres ke pressure ko monitor karta hai.

questions.question: TPMS light kab glow karti hai?

options.B: Jab tyre pressure significantly low ho
options.C: Jab gaadi tez speed par chale

questions.explanation: TPMS light tab glow karti hai jab ek ya zyada tyres ka pressure manufacturer ke recommended level se significantly kam ho jaata hai, jo safety hazard ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Nitrogen inflation ke kya benefits hain tyres mein?

options.A: Tyre ka colour change hota hai
options.B: Pressure zyada stable rehta hai, aur rim corrosion kam hota hai
options.D: Tyre puncture proof ho jaata hai

questions.explanation: Nitrogen air se zyada stable gas hai, isliye yeh temperature fluctuations ke saath pressure ko zyada stable rakhti hai. Iske alawa, isme moisture nahi hota, jisse rim corrosion kam hota hai.

questions.question: Run-flat tyres ko repair karne ke baare mein kya sahi hai?

options.A: Unhe kabhi repair nahi kiya ja sakta
options.B: Unhe repair kiya ja sakta hai, par special guidelines aur inspection ke saath
options.C: Unhe sirf string plug se repair kiya ja sakta hai
options.D: Unhe sirf hot patch se repair kiya ja sakta hai

questions.explanation: Run-flat tyres ko repair kiya ja sakta hai, par manufacturers ki specific guidelines ko follow karna zaroori hai. Damage severity aur location ko dhyan mein rakhna hota hai, aur aksar unhe replace karne ki salah di jaati hai.

questions.question: Customer ko tyre service ke baad kya advice deni chahiye?

options.B: Regular intervals par tyre pressure aur tread depth check karein
options.D: Tyre ko zyada hawa se bharein

questions.explanation: Customer ko regular tyre maintenance ke baare mein inform karna unki safety aur tyre life ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Workshop mein cleanliness aur organization kyun important hai?

options.A: Customer ko impress karne ke liye
options.B: Safety badhane aur efficient work environment banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Cleanliness aur organization se accidents kam hote hain, tools easily mil jaate hain, aur overall productivity badhti hai.

questions.question: TPMS sensor ko replace karne ke baad kya karna zaroori hai?

options.B: Sensor ko gaadi ke ECU (Engine Control Unit) ke saath re-learn ya reprogram karna

questions.explanation: Naye TPMS sensor ko gaadi ke system ke saath re-learn karna ya reprogram karna zaroori hai taaki system sensor se sahi readings receive kar sake.

questions.question: Customer complaints ko kaise handle karna chahiye?

options.B: Dhairyapurvak sunna aur samasya ka समाधान karne ki koshish karna
options.D: Customer ko workshop se nikal dena

questions.explanation: Customer complaints ko professionally handle karna, unki baat sunna aur unki samasya ka समाधान karna customer satisfaction aur business reputation ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Tyre ki manufacturing date kaise pata chalti hai?

options.A: DOT code ke baad ke 4 digits se
options.B: Tyre ke size se

questions.explanation: DOT code ke aakhri 4 digits manufacturing week aur year batate hain (e.g., 1521 ka matlab 15th week of 2021).

questions.question: Agar customer ko tyre alignment ki zaroorat ho toh aap kya advise denge?

options.B: Alignment karwane se tyre wear uniform hoga aur handling better hogi
options.C: Alignment se tyre life kam hogi
options.D: Alignment sirf naye tyres ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Proper wheel alignment se tyre wear evenly hota hai, fuel efficiency badhti hai, aur gaadi ki handling aur steering response improve hoti hai.

questions.question: Workshop mein tools aur equipment ka regular maintenance kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Unki life badhane aur safe operation ensure karne ke liye
options.C: Unhe zyada speed par chalane ke liye

questions.explanation: Regular maintenance se tools aur equipment ki life badhti hai, unki functionality maintain rehti hai, aur unka safe operation ensure hota hai.

questions.question: Tyre fitting aur balancing records maintain karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Customer ko zyada bill dene ke liye
options.B: Customer history track karne, warranty claims aur quality control ke liye
options.C: Record ko cupboard mein rakhne ke liye
options.D: Record ko delete karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Records se customer history track hoti hai, future service recommendations ke liye data milta hai, warranty claims mein help milti hai, aur quality control maintain rehta hai.

questions.question: Agar ek customer ko low profile tyres lagwane hain, toh kya extra considerations honge?

options.A: Unhe zyada hawa se bharna chahiye
options.B: Unhe balancing ki zaroorat nahi hai
options.C: Ride quality thodi harsh ho sakti hai aur rims ko damage ka zyada risk hota hai

questions.explanation: Low profile tyres mein sidewall chhota hota hai, jisse ride quality thodi harsh ho sakti hai aur potholes ya bumps par rims ko damage ka zyada risk hota hai.

questions.question: Tyre valves ke types kya ho sakte hain?

options.A: Rubber snap-in, Metal clamp-in, TPMS valves
options.B: Steel valves, Copper valves, Plastic valves
options.C: Long valves, Short valves, Medium valves
options.D: Red valves, Blue valves, Green valves

questions.explanation: Common tyre valves mein rubber snap-in valves, metal clamp-in valves (high speed applications ke liye), aur TPMS sensors ke saath integrated valves shamil hain.

questions.question: Customer ko tyre ki age ke baare mein kya advise deni chahiye?

options.A: Tyre ko 10 saal tak use karna chahiye
options.B: Tyre ko manufacturing date se 6 saal ke baad inspect karwana aur 10 saal ke baad replace karwana chahiye, irrespective of tread depth
options.C: Tyre ko kabhi replace nahi karna chahiye
options.D: Tyre ko har mahine replace karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Tyres ki rubber compound age ke saath degrade hoti hai, chahe tread depth acchi ho. Aam taur par, 6 saal ke baad inspection aur 10 saal ke baad replacement recommend kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Workshop mein hazardous waste (e.g., old tyres, used oil) ka proper disposal kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Environmental protection aur legal compliance ke liye
options.C: Customer ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Hazardous waste ka proper disposal environmental pollution ko rokta hai aur environmental regulations ke compliance ke liye zaroori hai.
